'''Vangaard Industries''' was the manufacturer of the [[Pathfinder-class scout ship|''Pathfinder''-class scout ship]] 63 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
